news.title: Hell Jump Beta iOS is out now!
news.caption: Hell Jump Beta is now available for iOS! Enjoy.

apps.name: Hell Jump (Beta)
apps.subtitle: A Hellish platformer.
apps.localizedDescription: Play as a simple cube trying to jump, dodge, and survive your way out. Expect precise controls, increasing difficulty, and a whole lot of rage-quits. Made with love in the Czech Republic. Coming in summer 2026.

versions.localizedDescription: Initial release of Hell Jump Beta on iOS.
